title: uragoga stellaris
side_effects: Uragoga stellaris can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and allergic reactions in some individuals. Prolonged or excessive consumption of the plant can lead to stomach ulcers, kidney damage, and liver toxicity. In rare cases, improper use of uragoga stellaris may cause heart palpitations, seizures, and even coma. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using any herbal remedies, including uragoga stellaris, to minimize the risk of adverse side effects.
